title: Better Trial Chambers
description: BTC is a Minecraft mod adding custom trial chambers, multiple new mobs, a magic system, and interactive systems like dungeon wires and a multitude of dungeon puzzles.
body:

# **This Project is still in ALPHA**
**Thank you for your continued support of this mod. This continued support helps keep me going in developing this mod. If you have ideas to be added or room ideas, I will happily take them in my Discord.**

> ### **Now that school is over for the time being I am able to commit more time to this project**

> ### **I am aware there are bugs, I just want to get this out there**


> ### Coming Soon!
> - New loot incentives to go to the chamber (In Obsidian Chest)
  > - Pet totem, which teleports the bound pet to you, if dead, respawns the pet near you, also makes the pet invulnerable
  > - Block key, uses Minecrafts built in NBT to make certain blocks lockable, can be duplicated.
  > - New armor trims
  > - Totem of Unbreaking, one of these: Apply on a smithing table or anvil, makes a damaged item unbreakable by using the Minecraft tag Unbreakable. 
> - Trial cube (Like the cube from portal)
> - Key Golem that sits on your shoulder and can open doors
> - Redesign of the chambers and rework the flow (later)



> **Credits**
- Discord Name: Miffenkop | For the Eternal Totem Texture, per request on the Fabric Discord
- Discord Name: Dimbywimby | For the Spell book item texture

> ## Why I Made This Mod  
> I created **BTC: Better Trial Chambers** because I’ve always loved the idea of ancient, hidden places in Minecraft that aren’t just about loot, but about mystery, challenge, and discovery.  
>
> When Mojang introduced trial chambers, I saw the potential for something much bigger:
>
> - Dungeon layouts that feel alive and dangerous  
> - Puzzles that genuinely challenge your brain and reflexes  
> - Custom mobs with their own lore, weaknesses, and abilities  
> - And a sense of deep, scattered history you have to piece together yourself  
>
> I’ve always admired games that make you feel like you’re uncovering forgotten things in dangerous places like *Minecraft Dungeons*. BTC is my attempt to bring that feeling to Minecraft’s survival world.  
>
> It’s also a way for me to combine what I enjoy:
>
> - Redstone puzzle mechanics  
> - Custom mobs and AI behaviors  
> - Lore-rich storytelling through environment and items  
>
> At the end of the day, this mod exists because I wanted something in Minecraft that didn’t just hand out loot for something relitivly easy; I wanted something that fought back, taught you its rules, added more lore to the existing parts of the game, and left you wondering what else might be lurking deeper underground.

##  BTC: Better Trial Chambers  

**BTC: Better Trial Chambers** is an ambitious Minecraft mod that expands on the idea of Mojang’s trial chambers, transforming them into sprawling, procedurally generated dungeon complexes filled with dynamic puzzles, custom mobs, ancient relics, and hidden lore.

###  Overview  
A **lore-driven, puzzle-heavy adventure mod** featuring **eldritch magic**, **ancient technology**, and **forgotten ruins beneath the surface of the Overworld**.

##  Features  

<details>
<summary> Modular Dungeon Networks</summary>

Trial chambers now generate as expansive, interconnected structures with multiple puzzle rooms, secret passageways, and unique traps. Each chamber features randomized layouts, lock mechanisms, and environmental hazards that test both your combat skills and puzzle-solving ability.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Copper Golems &  Tuff Golems (Custom Mobs)</summary>

- **Copper Golems**: Rusty, animated relics capable of pressing buttons, activating ancient machinery, and oxidizing over time unless waxed.  
- **Tuff Golems**: Decorative and functional dungeon guardians, with unique animations, sleep states, home-point binding, and item-carrying abilities.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Custom Entities: The Eldritch Luminaries</summary>

Ancient, enigmatic sorcerers clad in shimmering purple-blue cloaks. These miniboss mobs wield strange arcane powers, manipulating reality within their chambers. They guard rare artifacts and relics tied to the mod’s deeper lore. Three different versions, a pyromancer, a storm, and shadow summoner. All with different colors robes to differentiate between them.

</details>

<details>
<summary> The Codex of the Void (Still in Development)</summary>

An ultimate spell book, crafted by collecting **five elemental staffs** (Earth, Water, Fire, Wind, and Ender) and a base spellbook. Once assembled, it grants the wielder control over devastating spells and defensive wards.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Wire and Door Systems (Still needs mental help - oh wait, that's me)</summary>

Inspired by classic dungeon puzzle mechanics (*Minecraft Dungeons*), the mod adds **custom wire blocks**, **redstone-compatible systems**, and **ancient doors** that can only be opened through solving in-game puzzles or defeating chamber guardians.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Unique Items & Tools</summary>

**Wrench items** allow players to rotate blocks, reconfigure puzzle components, and manipulate dungeon elements dynamically, making every chamber’s layout and challenge customizable.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Environmental Lore and Artifacts</summary>

Hidden books, ancient devices, murals, and scattered relics throughout chambers reveal the long-forgotten history of the **Eldritch Luminaries**, their downfall, and their attempts to harness the power of the Void.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Custom Status Effects</summary>

BTC adds a collection of unique, lore-flavored status effects to spice up dungeon crawling and survival gameplay:

- **BUILDER_BLUNDER** - Causes blocks you place to just not place.  
- **MINER_MISHAP** - Completely prevents mining like mining fatigue, but you can still attack.  
- **DRAGON_SCALES** - Grants bonus resistance mimicking the fabled hide of ancient dragons, and reflects part of that damage to attackers.  
- **DROWNING** - Makes your screen turn blue and you start taking drowning damage faster; Respiration still helps.  
- **NO_NATURAL_REGENERATION** - Completely disables passive health regeneration, forcing you to rely on potions, enchanted items, or chamber-specific blessings.  
- **FROST_WALKER** - Similar to the enchantment, but with sprinting enabled. The level of the effect controls the ice radius (up to a limit)!

</details>

##  Why BTC Stands Out  

BTC isn’t just a content mod, it’s a **lore-driven expansion** to Minecraft’s adventure experience. It challenges players with:

- Spatial puzzles  
- Ancient magic systems  
- Interconnected dungeon mechanics  
- Morally gray, scattered lore  

Encouraging **exploration**, **experimentation**, and **mastery of forgotten relics** in a way vanilla Minecraft only hints at.

##  Planned Features (Might Happen)  

<details>
<summary> Concept Ideas (In Development)</summary>

- See Above!!

</details>

<details>
<summary> Join the Discord & Help Shape BTC!</summary>

Want to contribute ideas, get early access builds, or help squash bugs before new updates drop?  

**Join my official Discord server** where you can:

- Suggest ideas for new trial rooms, mobs, relics, and mechanics  
- Report bugs (bugs are top priority and handled before new content!)  
- Apply for **beta testing** to access unreleased builds and test future mechanics  

 **Note:**  
You’ll need to fill out a short application for beta testing. Regular players can still suggest ideas in Discord, but **beta testers get priority** for feature requests; unless it’s a bug, those always come first!

> **Your feedback shapes this mod.** Come help build it into something amazing!

</details>

##  Support This Passion Project  

This mod is my **passion project**, something I’ve been dreaming about and working on for a long time. As life gets busier and time gets tighter moving forward, I might not always have as much time as I’d like to keep developing and maintaining BTC.

If you’re a modder willing to help with things like **porting to new Minecraft versions**, adding new features, or testing updates, **I’d love the help**.  

And since this is something close to my heart and long in the making, it would mean the world if you supported the mod by:

- **Joining the Discord**  
- **Giving feedback and ideas**  
- **Downloading and playing the mod**  
- **Sharing it with your friends, servers, or other modding communities**

Every bit of support helps keep this project alive and growing, and your feedback directly shapes what gets added next.


> **Thank you for being a part of this. Let’s build something awesome together.**
> 
##  Sharing & Videos  

If you make a **video**, **stream**, or include BTC in a **modpack**, please go ahead and do it!  

All I ask is that you **mention BTC: Better Trial Chambers in your video description or modpack notes and have a link to this**.  

This kind of support helps me tremendously by spreading the word and bringing more players and testers to the community.

Thank you for helping the mod grow!

> ## Happy Playing!!!
